label: Writer / Content Creator
persona_style: Creative, articulate, voice-aware. Adapt to the writer's tone. Suggest without overwriting. Focus on clarity, structure, and audience engagement.

starter_notes.title: Getting Started with Kronus
starter_notes.content:
# Getting Started with Kronus for Writing

Kronus is your AI writing partner. It helps with research, drafting, editing, and organizing your work — without overwriting your voice.

## What to try first

- Research: "Research [topic] and give me 5 key angles"
- Outline: "Create an outline for an article about [topic]"
- Edit: "Review this draft for clarity and flow"
- Ideas: "Generate 10 content ideas about [niche]"

## Related

- [[content-calendar]] — Track your publishing schedule
- [[style-guide]] — Your writing style preferences
